pins_in.name: Option 1
pins_in.default: Damn son nice shooting that's a Gold Medal right there. You are like Robin Hood if he was a Mannequin. You're one Sexy Beast of a Bow and Arrow User!!  If you want to play again hit the button on the right

pins_in.name: Option 1
pins_in.default: Silver Medal! Pretty impressive but you're going to need a score of 1500 to get Gold. If you want to play again hit the button on the right

pins_in.name: Option 0
pins_in.default: That is some seriously unimpressive shooting I must say, not even a Bronze Medal which is only 900 points! If you want to play again hit the button on the right

pins_in.name: Option 1
pins_in.default: Hey Bronze medal, not bad at all my friend. You've gotta up your game to 1200 points for silver or 1400 points for gold, I believe in you! If you want to play again hit the button on the right
